last_action: Mind A validated PayPulse but flagged Butter Payments Score launch (Jan 2026) as competitive signal. Historical-only Phase 1 is viable IF targeting insurance/NBFCs not on Razorpay. Proposed zero-risk retroactive pilot model. Asked Mind B for API architecture, synthetic data feasibility, and pricing model.
next_expected: Mind B designs Phase 1 API contract, evaluates synthetic data approach with Harish, proposes pricing model, and addresses cold-start paradox.
